索引

A C D E F G H I J L M N O P R S T U V 
All Classes and Interfaces|所有程序包|序列化表格

A

ACCEPTED - enum class 中的枚举常量 edu.bupt.ta.model.ApplicationStatus
Application approved; TA has been selected.
ADMIN - enum class 中的枚举常量 edu.bupt.ta.model.UserRole
 
AdminDashboardServlet - edu.bupt.ta.controller中的类
Displays the Admin dashboard: workload statistics and summary metrics.
AdminDashboardServlet() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.controller.AdminDashboardServlet
 
AdminService - edu.bupt.ta.service中的类
Provides administrative operations: dashboard statistics, user workload analysis, and bulk user management.
AdminService() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.service.AdminService
 
AdminServlet - edu.bupt.ta.controller中的类
Central Admin controller handling all admin-panel routes.
AdminServlet() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.controller.AdminServlet
 
Application - edu.bupt.ta.model中的类
Represents a TA's application for a specific job posting.
Application() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.model.Application
 
Application(String, String, String, ApplicationStatus, String, String, String) - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.model.Application
 
ApplicationService - edu.bupt.ta.service中的类
Provides business-logic operations for job applications.
ApplicationService() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.service.ApplicationService
 
ApplicationStatus - edu.bupt.ta.model中的Enum Class
Possible states of a TA's job application.
ApplicationStatusServlet - edu.bupt.ta.controller中的类
Displays the current TA's submitted applications, enriched with job details (title, module code, organiser) via ApplicationWithJob.
ApplicationStatusServlet() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.controller.ApplicationStatusServlet
 
ApplicationWithJob - edu.bupt.ta.model中的类
A read-only view object that combines an Application with denormalized job details (title, module code, and organiser).
ApplicationWithJob(Application, String, String, String) - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.model.ApplicationWithJob
 
apply(String, String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.ApplicationService
Submits a new job application for a TA user.
ApplyServlet - edu.bupt.ta.controller中的类
Handles TA job application submissions.
ApplyServlet() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.controller.ApplyServlet
 
authenticate(String, String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.UserService
Authenticates a user by username and password.

C

calculateMatchScore(String, String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.JobService
Calculates a match score (0-100) between a TA's skills and a job's required skills.
calculateSummaryStatus(User) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.UserService
Calculates the completeness of a TA's profile.
calculateUserWorkloads() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.AdminService
Returns a map of TA user IDs to the total number of applications they have submitted.
CandidateSummaryServlet - edu.bupt.ta.controller中的类
Displays a structured candidate summary view for a TA's profile.
CandidateSummaryServlet() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.controller.CandidateSummaryServlet
 
clearCvMetadata(String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.UserService
Clears the CV metadata for a user, setting cvStatus to MISSING and all related columns to empty strings.
CLOSED - enum class 中的枚举常量 edu.bupt.ta.model.JobStatus
Job is closed; no further applications are accepted.
countActiveJobs() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.JobService
 
countActiveJobsByOrganiser(String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.JobService
 
countAllByStatus(ApplicationStatus) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.ApplicationService
 
countAllJobs() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.JobService
 
countApplicationsByJobId(String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.ApplicationService
 
countApplicationsByJobIds(Set<String>) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.ApplicationService
 
countApplicationsByJobIdsAndStatus(Set<String>, ApplicationStatus) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.ApplicationService
Counts applications for any job in the given set that have the specified status.
countJobsByOrganiser(String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.JobService
 
countTotalApplications() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.ApplicationService
Returns the total number of applications in the CSV.
countTotalJobs() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.JobService
 
countUserPendingAndInterview(String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.ApplicationService
 
createJob(String, String, String, int, int, int, String, String, int) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.JobService
Creates and persists a new job posting.
CvDeleteServlet - edu.bupt.ta.controller中的类
Handles deletion of the current TA's uploaded CV.
CvDeleteServlet() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.controller.CvDeleteServlet
 
CvFileService - edu.bupt.ta.service中的类
Handles physical file operations for TA CV PDFs.
CvFileService() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.service.CvFileService
 
CvFileService.SavedCvFile - edu.bupt.ta.service中的类
Holds metadata about a successfully saved CV file.
CvUploadServlet - edu.bupt.ta.controller中的类
Handles PDF CV file upload for the current TA.
CvUploadServlet() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.controller.CvUploadServlet
 

D

DashboardService - edu.bupt.ta.service中的类
Provides data for the TA dashboard: pending application counts, matched job counts, and personalised best-match messages.
DashboardService() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.service.DashboardService
 
deleteApplications(List<String>) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.ApplicationService
Removes all applications whose IDs are in the given list from the CSV.
deleteApplications(List<String>) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.storage.FileStorageUtil
Removes application rows whose IDs are in the given list from the applications CSV.
deleteCv(String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.CvFileService
Deletes the CV file from disk.
deleteJob(String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.JobService
Permanently removes a job from the CSV by ID.
doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.controller.AdminDashboardServlet
 
doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.controller.AdminServlet

F

FileDownloadServlet - edu.bupt.ta.controller中的类
Streams a TA's uploaded CV PDF to the browser.
FileDownloadServlet() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.controller.FileDownloadServlet
 
FileStorageUtil - edu.bupt.ta.storage中的类
Centralised file-based persistence layer for the TA Recruitment System.
FileStorageUtil() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.storage.FileStorageUtil
 
findById(String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.ApplicationService
 
findById(String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.JobService
Looks up a job by its ID.
findById(String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.UserService
Looks up a user by their unique ID (e.g.
findByUsername(String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.UserService
Looks up a user by username.
formatFileSize(long) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.CvFileService
 
fromString(String) - enum class中的静态方法 edu.bupt.ta.model.ApplicationStatus
Parses a string value into an ApplicationStatus.
fromString(String) - enum class中的静态方法 edu.bupt.ta.model.JobStatus
Parses a string value into a JobStatus.
fromString(String) - enum class中的静态方法 edu.bupt.ta.model.UserRole
Parses a string value into a UserRole.

G

getAllApplications() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.ApplicationService
 
getAllJobs() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.JobService
Returns all jobs from the CSV, regardless of status.
getAllLogs() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.LogService
 
getAllTaUsers() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.UserService
Returns all users whose role is TA.
getAllUsers() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.UserService
Returns all users, with summaryStatus and cvStatus recalculated for each.

getApplicationId() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.model.Application
 
getApplicationId() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.model.ApplicationWithJob

getAvailability() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.model.User
 
getBaseDir() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.storage.FileStorageUtil
Returns the resolved base data directory path.
getBestMatchMessage(User) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.DashboardService
Returns a personalised message describing the highest-scoring job for the user.
getContentType() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.CvFileService.SavedCvFile
 
getCreatedAt() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.model.SystemLog

Returns the creation timestamp formatted as "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss".

getCvUploadedAt() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.model.User
 
getDashboardStats() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.AdminService
Returns a comprehensive set of dashboard statistics: TA/MO counts, application counts by status, job counts, and the top 5 TAs and top 3 jobs ranked by application count.

getDetails() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.model.SystemLog
 
getDisplayName() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.model.User

getHours() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.model.Job

Returns all jobs whose organiser matches the given name (case-insensitive).

getMatchedJobs(User) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.DashboardService
Counts how many open jobs have a matchScore of 60 or higher for the given user.

H

hasUploadedCv(User) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.UserService
Checks whether the user has a CV file uploaded.
hasUploadedCv(String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.UserService
Checks whether the specified user has uploaded a CV, by userId lookup.
HomeServlet - edu.bupt.ta.controller中的类
Home page controller.
HomeServlet() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.controller.HomeServlet
 

I

INTERVIEW - enum class 中的枚举常量 edu.bupt.ta.model.ApplicationStatus
Application shortlisted; an interview is scheduled.
isApplicationReady(User) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.UserService
Determines whether a user is eligible to apply for jobs.

J

Job - edu.bupt.ta.model中的类
Represents a job posting in the TA Recruitment System.
Job() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.model.Job
Default constructor.
Job(String, String, String, String, int, int, int, JobStatus, String, int, String, int) - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.model.Job
Full constructor.
JobListServlet - edu.bupt.ta.controller中的类
Lists all open jobs for the current TA, sorted by match score descending.
JobListServlet() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.controller.JobListServlet
 
JobService - edu.bupt.ta.service中的类
Provides business-logic operations for job postings.
JobService() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.service.JobService
 
JobStatus - edu.bupt.ta.model中的Enum Class
Possible states of a job posting.

L

loadApplications() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.storage.FileStorageUtil
Loads all applications from applications.csv.
loadJobs() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.storage.FileStorageUtil
Loads all jobs from jobs.csv.
loadUsers() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.storage.FileStorageUtil
Loads all users from ta_users.csv.
log(String, String, String, String, String, String, String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.LogService
Appends a new audit log entry to the system log file.
LoginServlet - edu.bupt.ta.controller中的类
Handles user login.
LoginServlet() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.controller.LoginServlet
 
LogoutServlet - edu.bupt.ta.controller中的类
Destroys the current session and redirects to the home page.
LogoutServlet() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.controller.LogoutServlet
 
LogService - edu.bupt.ta.service中的类
Manages the system audit log stored in data/system_logs.csv.
LogService() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.service.LogService
Creates the LogService and ensures the log file exists with a header row.

M

MO - enum class 中的枚举常量 edu.bupt.ta.model.UserRole
 
MOApplicationServlet - edu.bupt.ta.controller中的类
Displays and manages applications for the logged-in MO's jobs.
MOApplicationServlet() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.controller.MOApplicationServlet
 
MODashboardServlet - edu.bupt.ta.controller中的类
Displays the MO dashboard, showing only jobs created by the logged-in MO (matched by display name).
MODashboardServlet() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.controller.MODashboardServlet
 
MOJobServlet - edu.bupt.ta.controller中的类
Handles MO job creation.
MOJobServlet() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.controller.MOJobServlet
 

N

nowText() - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.storage.FileStorageUtil
Returns the current timestamp formatted as "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss".

O

OPEN - enum class 中的枚举常量 edu.bupt.ta.model.JobStatus
Job is open and accepting applications.

P

PENDING - enum class 中的枚举常量 edu.bupt.ta.model.ApplicationStatus
Application submitted and awaiting review.

R

RegisterServlet - edu.bupt.ta.controller中的类
Handles TA registration.
RegisterServlet() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.controller.RegisterServlet
 
registerTa(String, String, String, String, int, String, String, String, String, String, String, String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.UserService
Registers a new TA account.
registerUser(User) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.UserService
Saves an externally-constructed User to the CSV.
REJECTED - enum class 中的枚举常量 edu.bupt.ta.model.ApplicationStatus
Application declined or rejected.
resolveExistingCvPath(String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.CvFileService
 

S

saveApplications(List<Application>) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.storage.FileStorageUtil
Saves all applications to applications.csv, replacing the entire file contents.
SavedCvFile(String, String, String, long, Path) - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.service.CvFileService.SavedCvFile
Constructs a SavedCvFile with all metadata fields.
saveJobs(List<Job>) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.storage.FileStorageUtil
Saves all jobs to jobs.csv, replacing the entire file contents.
savePdf(String, Part) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.CvFileService
Saves an uploaded PDF file to the data/cvs/ directory.
saveUsers(List<User>) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.storage.FileStorageUtil
Saves all users to ta_users.csv, replacing the entire file contents.
saveUsersDirect(List<User>) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.AdminService
Directly persists a user list to CSV, bypassing individual field updates.
saveUsersDirect(List<User>) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.UserService
Directly persists a list of users to CSV, replacing all existing records.
searchLogs(String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.LogService

Represents an entry in the system audit log.

T

TA - enum class 中的枚举常量 edu.bupt.ta.model.UserRole
 
TaDashboardServlet - edu.bupt.ta.controller中的类
Displays the TA dashboard for the current logged-in TA.
TaDashboardServlet() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.controller.TaDashboardServlet
 
TaProfileServlet - edu.bupt.ta.controller中的类
Manages the TA profile page.
TaProfileServlet() - 类的构造器 edu.bupt.ta.controller.TaProfileServlet
 
toggleJobStatus(String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.JobService
Toggles a job's status between OPEN and CLOSED.
toggleUserStatus(String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.AdminService
Toggles a user's status between ACTIVE and INACTIVE.
toggleUserStatus(String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.UserService
Toggles a user's account status between ACTIVE and INACTIVE.

U

updateCvMetadata(String, String, String, String, String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.UserService
Updates the five CV-related columns in a user's record after a successful file upload.
updateJob(String, String, String, String, int, int, int, String, String, int) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.JobService
Updates the editable fields of an existing job.
updatePassword(String, String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.UserService
Updates the password for a user.
updateProfile(String, String, String, int, String, String, String, String, String, String, String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.UserService
Updates the editable profile fields for an existing user.
updateStatus(String, ApplicationStatus) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.ApplicationService
Updates the status of an application, using a default note based on the new status.
updateStatus(String, ApplicationStatus, String) - 类中的方法 edu.bupt.ta.service.ApplicationService
Updates the status and optionally the notes of an application.
User - edu.bupt.ta.model中的类
Represents a user account in the TA Recruitment System.

User roles in the TA Recruitment System.
UserService - edu.bupt.ta.service中的类
Provides business-logic operations for user accounts and TA profiles.
